updates.note: Implementation ordered in the first cabinet meeting at Nabanna on May 11, 2026. CM confirmed rollout of Ayushman Bharat and other Central government schemes previously blocked by the TMC government. CM also assured that no existing state social welfare schemes would be discontinued. Actual beneficiary enrolment and hospital onboarding ongoing — no gazette notification published yet. ↗ Business Standard · PTI · May 11, 2026 ↗ Anandabazar Patrika · May 11, 2026 ↗ The Hindu · May 11, 2026
